summary: Tour Analytics feature testing completed. All backend API tests passed (20/20). Frontend GuidedTour analytics tracking verified - fires events on step_view, step_next, step_back, skip, complete, cta_click, restart. TourAnalyticsPage loads correctly with KPI cards, funnel chart, dropoff chart, daily trend, and step breakdown table. Tour Analytics link visible in More dropdown under Admin section.
seed_data_creation: Created test tour events via POST /api/analytics/tour during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tour Analytics feature is fully functional. Backend: POST /api/analytics/tour tracks events (step_view, step_next, step_back, skip, complete, cta_click, restart) with session_id. GET /api/analytics/tour/summary returns totals, funnel, dropoff, daily data with completion_rate and cta_rate. Frontend: GuidedTour.jsx calls trackTour() at each interaction. TourAnalyticsPage.jsx at /admin/tour-analytics shows KPIs, charts, and table. Tour Analytics link in More dropdown under Admin section. All data-testids work: tour-analytics-page, tour-analytics-title, tour-period-7d/30d/90d, tour-refresh-btn, tour-step-table.

backend_post_tour_endpoint: POST /api/analytics/tour with missing required fields returns 422 - PASS
backend_summary_endpoint: Summary response has correct data types - PASS

CTA click fires cta_click + complete events - PASS
frontend_tour_analytics_page: KPI cards display (Tour Starts, Completions, CTA Clicks, Skip Rate) - PASS
